featured_tweets.label: The Innermost Loop
featured_tweets.text:
OpenAI's $110B mega-round closes — Amazon $50B, SoftBank $30B, Nvidia $30B. Valuation: $840B. GPT-5.4 ships same week.

Broadcom guides $22B quarter on custom AI chip demand. Memory makers forecast $551B in 2026 revenue.

The AI industrial complex now has its own GDP.
featured_tweets.author: @alexwg

featured_tweets.label: Cisco AI
featured_tweets.text:
Silicon One G300 is here — 102.4 Tbps switching silicon built for massive AI cluster networking. When you're connecting tens of thousands of GPUs, the network IS the computer. We're making sure it keeps up.

#CiscoAI #DataCenter #AIInfrastructure
featured_tweets.author: @Cisco

featured_tweets.label: My Take
featured_tweets.text:
OpenAI raised $110 billion this week. Meanwhile, most enterprise AI teams can't get budget approval for a $50K data quality initiative.

The gap between what's possible with AI and what's deployable in production keeps widening.

Fix your data pipeline before you upgrade your model.
featured_tweets.author: @ethanhill

stories.headline: OpenAI Closes Record $110B Funding Round Led by Amazon, SoftBank, and Nvidia
stories.summary: $840B valuation. 900M weekly active users. 50M paid subscribers. The question isn't whether OpenAI is big — it's whether any single company should control this much of the AI stack.

stories.headline: Broadcom Guides $22B Quarter as Custom AI Chip Business Stays Hot
stories.summary: CEO Hock Tan says Broadcom won't see real competition in custom AI silicon 'for many years.' Strong demand for Google's 7th-gen Ironwood TPU. The custom chip war is just getting started.

stories.headline: Apple Unveils AI-Powered Siri Overhaul with On-Screen Awareness, Powered by Gemini
stories.summary: Reimagined Siri debuts with iOS 26.4 — context-aware, cross-app, built on Google's 1.2T parameter Gemini model running on Private Cloud Compute. Apple chose to partner rather than build from scratch. Smart move or dependency risk?

stories.headline: Memory Makers Set to Earn $551B from AI Boom in 2026 — Double Contract Chip Manufacturers
stories.summary: 3D NAND and DRAM revenue projected to hit $551.6B. The AI supercycle isn't just about GPUs — memory is quietly becoming the biggest winner in the semiconductor stack.

stories.headline: Cisco Launches Silicon One G300: 102.4 Tbps Switching for AI Data Centers
stories.summary: Purpose-built networking silicon for massive AI cluster buildouts. When you're connecting 100K+ GPUs, the fabric between them matters as much as the chips themselves.

stories.headline: The New CIO Mandate: Strategy, Speed, and Scaled Intelligence
stories.summary: CIOs are becoming strategy architects, not just tech stewards. AI has surpassed cybersecurity and infra modernization as the #1 investment priority. Half of all companies plan budget increases above 4%.

stories.headline: Deloitte's GenW.AI Platform Tackles the Enterprise AI Scaling Gap
stories.summary: The hardest part of enterprise AI isn't the model — it's turning pilots into production. Deloitte is betting a platform play can bridge that gap for large orgs.

stories.headline: AI Agents Poised to Become the Most Widely Adopted Enterprise AI Solution in 2026
stories.summary: Agents that orchestrate across systems, reduce friction between departments, and eliminate repetitive tasks. The real unlock: agents that can reason about objectives, not just follow scripts.

stories.headline: Lenovo Showcases AI-Powered Enterprise Devices and Platforms at MWC 2026
stories.summary: Modular, enterprise-ready AI devices designed to scale AI with confidence. The edge AI hardware play is heating up — not everything runs in the cloud.

stories.headline: March 11 Federal Deadlines Will Reshape the AI Regulatory Landscape
stories.summary: FTC must issue AI policy statement by March 11. Commerce Department evaluating which state AI laws conflict with federal policy. The preemption fight is about to get real.

stories.headline: Chinese Tech Giants Feeling the Strain: Alibaba Reshuffles, Baidu Profits Drop 42%
stories.summary: Alibaba reallocating resources to foundational models after senior exits. Baidu's quarterly profit down 42%. National AI ambition doesn't automatically solve the business model problem.

stories.headline: Hyperscalers Plan Nearly $700B in Data Center Spending for 2026
stories.summary: Amazon $200B, Google $175-185B, Meta $115-135B. AI chips consume 10-14x more power than traditional processors. Some campuses are now topping 1 GW — enough to power entire cities.

featured_tweets.label: The Innermost Loop
featured_tweets.text:
Anthropic approaching $20B annualized revenue. Apple M5 Pro ships Neural Accelerators inside each GPU core — 4x AI performance over M4. OpenAI teases GPT-5.4 is 'sooner than you think.'

The Singularity now has a revenue run rate to match.
featured_tweets.author: @alexwg

featured_tweets.label: Salesforce AI
featured_tweets.text: Agentforce is redefining how enterprises scale customer service. Autonomous agents now resolve 40% of cases without human intervention — and they're getting smarter every week.
featured_tweets.author: @salesforce

featured_tweets.label: My Take
featured_tweets.text:
Unpopular opinion: Most enterprise AI failures aren't AI failures.

They're data quality failures wearing an AI hat.

Best model in the world won't save garbage data.

CIOs spending millions on models while ignoring data governance are lighting money on fire.
featured_tweets.author: @ethanhill

stories.headline: 2026 Enterprise AI Predictions: Fragmentation, Commodification, and the Agent Push Facing CIOs
stories.summary: 75%+ of CIOs expect to invest in agentic AI by year-end. Focus areas: sales, ops, finance, compliance. The shift from copilots to autonomous agents is accelerating.

stories.headline: CIO Priorities 2026: CIOs Refocus on Value as AI Scales Across the Enterprise
stories.summary: CIOs are no longer judged on whether they can adopt AI, but whether they can prove its value. Fewer experiments, more production deployments.

stories.headline: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.4 for Complex Professional Workflows
stories.summary: New model designed for long-running enterprise tasks. 47% fewer tokens on professional workloads. The efficiency gain matters — token costs are a real line item for IT teams.

stories.headline: Foxconn Revenue Surges 21.6% on AI Server Demand
stories.summary: Hon Hai reports strong growth driven by Nvidia-based AI infrastructure. The AI buildout is real — follow the supply chain, not the hype cycle.

stories.headline: China Unveils AI-Centric Economic Blueprint, Mentions AI 50+ Times
stories.summary: New economic plan embeds 'AI+ action plan' across industries. State-backed AI integration at a scale no Western government is matching.

stories.headline: Claude Cowork Now Runs Scheduled Tasks from Your Desktop
stories.summary: Set up automated workflows that run on a schedule — inbox digests, report generation, daily briefings — all from the Claude desktop app.

stories.headline: Fujitsu Launches AI Platform Automating Full Software Development Lifecycle
stories.summary: Not just copilot coding — full lifecycle from requirements to testing. Enterprise-grade, aimed at large IT orgs managing hundreds of internal apps.

stories.headline: SageX AI Layer Eliminates Manual ERP Data Entry
stories.summary: Converts unstructured docs into structured, ERP-ready data. The pattern: AI as translation layer between messy real-world data and rigid enterprise systems.

stories.headline: The Great CIO Platform Reset: Why Agentic AI Is Forcing a 2026 Reckoning
stories.summary: Enterprise architecture decisions from 3 years ago are now blocking AI agent deployment. CIOs face a platform reset whether they planned for it or not.

stories.headline: 5 CIO Predictions for AI in 2026
stories.summary: Data quality will be the biggest AI bottleneck. Organizations haven't accounted for the cost and timeline to fix their data foundations.

stories.headline: U.S. Weighing New AI Chip Export Controls Tied to Data Center Investment
stories.summary: Foreign buyers seeking large AI chip shipments may need to invest in U.S. data centers or provide security guarantees.

stories.headline: UK Backs £40M Frontier AI Research Lab for Science and Healthcare
stories.summary: New lab focused on long-horizon AI breakthroughs. Government-funded AI R&D is picking up pace globally.
